name: Admiral's Tricorne
description: Anyone who said that the size of your hat doesn't matter must be wearing a bandana.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Euphonia's Hat Box

name: Alchemist's Crown
description:
House Cannith alchemists often don crowns such as this to grant them wisdom
and foresight, allowing them to make decisions with greater clarity.
dropLocation: House Cannith Manufactury, Tegan Darsit 's chest (Rare encounter)

name: Arcsteel Brim
description: Keep the rain out of your eyes.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Aspect of the Wild Hunt
description:
This ferocious hood can only be mastered by those who have become one with their
animalistic aspect...
dropLocation: The Dryad and the Demigod, End chest and optional chest

name: Battered Helm
description: This battered helm has seen a good deal of use.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, End reward

name: Battleworn Helm
description: This helm once belonged to Gerard Dryden, and has seen much use.
dropLocation: The Crypt of Gerard Dryden, old End chest

name: Beacon of Tira
description:
This brightly polished pure silver helm radiates light. A blue flame that almost
appears to burn is attached to the top.
dropLocation: Silver Flame Nugget, End reward

name: Boundless
description: The possibilities are limitless.
dropLocation: To Curse the Sky, End Chest

name: Brawler's Helm
description: This helm keeps your head from taking a few too many hits.
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Braza's Hat
description:
An inch of dust lies atop this battered and weather worn hat, perhaps suggesting
that Nash was not always a simple farmer.
dropLocation: Where There's Smoke..., Gazmul 's chest

name: Bulwark Helm
description: It's got a few dents but otherwise quite sturdy.
dropLocation: Total Chaos, End chest.

name: Cannith Crafted Helmet
description: This is a Cannith crafted helmet.

name: Captain's Chapeau
description: You've certainly earned the feather in your cap.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Euphonia's Hat Box ; DDO Store

name: Chainmail Coif
description: Fine links of flametouched iron form this magical helm.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Vorvand Darkfur 's chest (Rare Encounter) ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Charming Festival Mask
description:
Wear this to charm both your friends and enemies! Thismask has a whimsical look
that partially covers your face and gives you 8 charges of the Charm Person
spell to cast on enemies. These charges do not re charge after resting.
dropLocation: DDO Store

name: Chimera's Crown
description: A sturdy helm that is often a gift to the dragonmarked from House Deneith.
dropLocation: The Tide Turns, End chest

name: Circlet of Persuasion
description: A circlet of silver chain holding a glowing green gem.
dropLocation: Random, any ~level 7 chest

name: Circlet of Shar
description: Shar's faithful have been known to wear this style of circlet.
dropLocation: The Darkness and the Light, end chest

name: Citadel's Gaze
description:
Presented as a gift from the Boromar Clan to the Knight-Marshall of the Citadel,
Sir Banarak Tithon, this helmet contains immense personal significance. It's
a shame he doesn't wear it, as it's a uniquely beautiful piece.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, End chest

name: Compliance
description: Of course. Whatever you say.
dropLocation: The Age of Rage, end chest

name: Corsair's Bandana
description:
A stylish bandana. Ownership of one like this is a sign of respect from the
pirates of Three-Barrel Cove.
dropLocation: Three-Barrel Cove (heroic), End reward

name: Corsair's Cap
description:
It is rumored that this dyed bandana belonged to Ugly Pete, a pirate that scuttled
many a ship on the Thunder Sea.
dropLocation: Dirty Laundry, End reward

name: Corsair's Skullcap
description: The skull shows everyone that you're not one to be messed with. Arr!
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Euphonia's Hat Box

name: Covert Cowl
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Cowl of the Devotee
description: A covering made for those devoted to one of the Temple's twisted cults, reclaimed.
dropLocation: ToEE: Lower Temple Complex, end chest

name: Creation Forge Bassinet
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Crisis Helm
dropLocation: Dinosaur Crisis, optional chest

name: Crown of Bone
description: These bones creak as if to say, "I am older than you know."
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, any chest (epic)

name: Crown of Butterflies
description: Delightful butterflies flutter around your head.
dropLocation: Immortality Lessons, End chest, 'Granny' Optional Chest

name: Crown of Evening's Rise
description: The cool of twilight surrounds this helmet's metallic frame.
dropLocation: Secrets of the Red Wizards, end chest

name: Crown of Fireflies
description: The warm and inviting light of living fireflies fill you with hope.
dropLocation: The Endless Revels, End chest

name: Crown of Leaves
description: This Eladrin crown is exquisitely crafted.
dropLocation: Make Believe, End chest

name: Crown of Morning's Glory
description:
As the morning brings comfort to those who lived through the night, this helm
brings fire and light.
dropLocation: Oghma's Song, end chest

name: Crown of Snow
description: A crown of packed snow and arcane magic, both beautiful and cold.
dropLocation: The Legend of the Lost Locket, End chest

name: Cult of the Dragon Mask
description: A mask worn by members of the Cult of the Dragon.
dropLocation: The Mask of Deception, First 2 cultists, Supply room chest

name: Darkstorm Helm
description:
Helms such as this, forged from some dark and glittering metal, are worn by
drow spellcasters both arcane and divine to heighten the power of their spells.
This helm can channel enough energy to start a brief thunderstorm.
dropLocation: Servants of the Overlord, locked chest, end chest

name: Death's Smile
description: A look that penetrates the soul.
dropLocation: The Night Revels, Turn in Joe Candymaker

name: Decision
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Defender's Masque
description: This distinctive golden mask leaves only a small area for you to see.
dropLocation: The Curse and the Captive Crustacean, end chest

name: Deific Diadem
description: The crown the abbot had made to signify his ascension and godhood.
dropLocation: Ascension Chamber, Raid Warded chest

name: Delver's Helm
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Dinosaur Bone Helmet
description: Fashioned of intricately carved bones of long-forgotten Dinosaurs.
dropLocation: Skeletons in the Closet, The Mountain Keeper chest, end chest

name: Downcast Bowler
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Ends and Means, end chest

name: Downcast Cap
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: A Miner Sacrifice, optional chest

name: Downcast Cowl
description: This discarded cowl has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Snowfall and Sunlight, Potion Paw 's chest

name: Downcast Helm
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Cold Snap, end chest

name: Downcast Top Hat
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Locked Away (Part Two), end chest

name: Dragon Masque
description: You must reanimate additional dracoliches.
dropLocation: Fire on Thunder Peak, raid chest

name: Dread Stalker's Skullcap
description: The lenses fused into this mask tint the world a dusty red.
dropLocation: Spiders and Flies, end chest

name: Drow Sage's Cowl
description:
The wise are just as vulnerable as anyone else to having their thoughts twisted;
they just believe more fervently that they were right all along.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

name: Elder's Cap
description:
Tribal drow elders use these caps to focus their minds and recall past events.
They are passed down through the generations but few of them remain in existence.
dropLocation: Into the Deep, End reward

name: Elemental Victory
description:
You have delved deep into the Temple of Elemental Evil, and conquered all four
of its nodes; where will your journey take you next, weathered traveller?
dropLocation: ToEE: Depths of the Temple, end chest (confirmed), ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests, ToEE: Fire Node, Periron chest, ToEE: Water Node, Jotun Rimeblade chest, and ToEE: Earth Node, Hyrelgas chest

name: Eloquence
description: When all you have is words, they cut like the sharpest blade.
dropLocation: Demon Assault, end chest

name: Engraved Circlet
description: A series of ornate carvings cover this slightly tarnished circlet.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, End reward

name: Epic Big Top
description:
This is the strange, formal hat that Malicia was wearing when she was defeated.
Placing it atop one's head confers a greater understanding of all things magical.
dropLocation: Epic version of The Big Top

name: Epic Chainmail Coif
description: Fine links of flametouched iron form this magical helm.
dropLocation: Epic version of Chainmail Coif

name: Epic Chimera's Crown
description: A sturdy helm that is often a gift to the dragonmarked from House Deneith.
dropLocation: Epic version of Chimera's Crown

name: Epic Crisis Helm
dropLocation: Dinosaur Crisis, optional chest

name: Epic Darkstorm Helm
description:
Helms such as this, forged from some dark and glittering metal, are worn by
drow spellcasters both arcane and divine to heighten the power of their spells.
This helm can channel enough energy to start a brief thunderstorm.
dropLocation: Epic version of Darkstorm Helm

name: Epic Deific Diadem
description:
The crown the abbot had made to signify his ascension and godhood, now a reminder
of his ultimate failure.
dropLocation: The Mark of Death, warded chest

name: Epic Elder's Cap
description:
Tribal drow elders use these caps to focus their minds and recall past events.
They are passed down through the generations but few of them remain in existence.
dropLocation: Epic version of Elder's Cap

name: Epic Elemental Victory
description:
You have delved deep into the Temple of Elemental Evil, and conquered all four
of its nodes; where will your journey take you next, weathered traveller?
dropLocation: ToEE: Depths of the Temple, end chest (confirmed), ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests, ToEE: Fire Node, Periron chest, ToEE: Water Node, Jotun Rimeblade chest, and ToEE: Earth Node, Hyrelgas chest

name: Epic Eloquence
description: When all you have is words, they cut like the sharpest blade.
dropLocation: Demon Assault, end chest

name: Epic Emerald Gaze
description:
It is said, the only way to obtain a helm of the Emerald Claw is to join their
ranks... or to remove their head.
dropLocation: Desecrated Temple of Vol (epic), end chest

name: Epic Explorer's Hat
description:
It's well worn, and fits like a glove. Well, a hat, not a glove, but you get
the idea.
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, end chest

name: Epic Halcyonia
description:
Shavarath may never know peace, but when this helm rests upon one's head, it
almost seems... possible.
dropLocation: The Archons' Trial, end chest

name: Epic Headman's Hood
description:
A dirty cloth hood spattered with blood. It stinks of old sweat and gives off
an aura of palpable fear.
dropLocation: The Mystery of Delera's Tomb, End Chest

name: Epic Helm of Frost
description:
This helm has a chill about it and is cold where it touches your skin. Nevertheless
it will protect you from harmful cold magic, and allows you to release some
of that energy against foes.
dropLocation: Epic version of Helm of Frost

name: Epic Helm of the Mroranon
description:
This powerful helm is an ancient keepsake of the Mroranon Clan of the Ironroot
Mountains.
dropLocation: Epic version of Helm of the Mroranon

name: Epic Helm of the Red Dragon
description: This helm is crafted in the likeness of a vicious red dragon.
dropLocation: Plane of Night, warded chest (Epic)
setBonus: Epic Soul of the Red Dragon
_file: Epic Helm of the Red Dragon.item

name: Epic Mask of Comedy
description:
A mask crafted for and used by the actors of Livewood Theater. It represents
happiness and high spirits, and is invested with magic to match.
dropLocation: Epic version of Mask of Comedy

name: Epic Mask of the Asylum
dropLocation: The Old Archives, End Chest

name: Epic Mask of Tragedy
description:
A mask crafted for and used by the actors of Livewood Theater. It represents
sadness and misfortune, and is invested with magic to match.
dropLocation: Epic version of Mask of Tragedy

name: Epic Memories of Charity
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone who gave everything they had when
it mattered most.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Epic Memories of Immortality
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone courageous.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Epic Memories of Insight
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone who knew everything.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Epic Memories of Kindness
description:
A fragment of misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone who was kind to you.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Epic Memories of the Mighty
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone mighty.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Epic Memories of the Unseen
description:
A fragment of misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of somene
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Epic Minos Legens
dropLocation: Flesh Maker's Laboratory (epic), end chest

name: Epic Muffled Veneer
description:
This hood and face guard are rumored to have belonged to Captain Slipclaw, an
infamous pillager of early Stormreach.
dropLocation: Ghosts of Perdition (epic), end chest

name: Epic Mushroom Cap
description:
This large mushroom cap, a remnant of Zuggtmoy's power, has an indent large
enough to fit one's head. To the resourceful adventurer, anything can become
useful gear.
dropLocation: ToEE: Water Node, Jotun Rimeblade chest (Confirmed), ToEE: Earth Node, Hyrelgas chest (Confirmed), ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests, and ToEE: Fire Node, Periron chest

name: Epic Sacred Helm
description:
Though used primarily by drow ascetics, this helm will protect any healer from
death magic and the undead.
dropLocation: Epic version of Sacred Helm

name: Epic Seraphim
description: This helm was taken from the body of a fallen Astral Deva.
dropLocation: Inferno of the Damned (epic), end chest

name: Epic Shining Crest of St. Markus
description:
A circlet of pure silver, wearable only by the virtuous souls that would risk
their own lives to combat the forces of darkness.
dropLocation: Epic version of Shining Crest of St. Markus
_file: Epic Shining Crest of St. Markus.item

name: Epic Skullduggery Cap
description: When shady work is the order of the evening, a light cap can be essential.
dropLocation: Epic version of Skullduggery Cap

name: Epic Smuggler's Cap
description:
The sort of cap used by smugglers and lawful sailors alike, allowing the user
to fit into mixed company.
dropLocation: Epic version of Smuggler's Cap

name: Epic Spiked Turban
description: A spiked helm with a silk wrapping to ward off the desert sun.
dropLocation: Epic version of Spiked Turban

name: Executioner's Helm
description: The look of these eyes is the last thing many will ever see.
dropLocation: Secret of the Slavers' Stockade, End chest

name: Explorer of the Depths
description:
This magical cloth has been enchanted to prevent you from drowning. Its distinct
insignia seems to have been sewn with great care.
dropLocation: Saltmarsh, any legendary chest; or The Haunting of Saltmarsh (Epic) saga end reward

name: Explorer's Hat
description:
It's well worn, and fits like a glove. Well, a hat, not a glove, but you get
the idea.
dropLocation: The Promise of Fire, end chest

name: Face of the Demon
description:
This skull-faced helmet covers the entire face and head, focusing the wearer's
vision on but a single target.
dropLocation: The Tear of Dhakaan, Champion Nartrar 's chest

name: Faedark Faerielights
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Crown of Fireflies 

The calm and hollow light of blinking faerylights fill your foes with despair.
dropLocation: The Feywild, Feytwisted chests

name: Fancy Flayer's Headpiece
description: You can't just devour intelligence, you have to look smart as well!
dropLocation: Fred's First Date, end chest

name: Firemouth's Diving Helmet
description: This sturdy metal helmet allows you to breathe underwater.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chest

name: Flame Priest's Focus
description:
A long-dead leader of the Eternal Flame left their mark behind, in the hopes
someone would take up their mantle.
dropLocation: ToEE: Depths of the Temple, end chest

name: Founder's Helm
description:
This helm commemorates the Founding of Stormreach, the day that the Coin Lords
first allowed adventurers free run of the city.
dropLocation: Special event items, must own a Founder's Account - see tips

name: Freebooter's Bandana
description: You're no mere swabby. Yarr!
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Euphonia's Hat Box

name: Garzad's Helm
description: An old plate helm, without a dent or scratch on it.
dropLocation: Retrieve the Stolen Goods, Garzad 's chest

name: Gilded Branches
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Glacial Casque
description:
This steel casque radiates cold and is covered by a thin layer of frost, no
matter what the weather.
dropLocation: The Abandoned Excavation, End reward

name: Graskitch's Skullcap
description:
This helmet was prized by its original owner, a foul tempered kobold Guard.
Though it is of simple design, it is thick enough to provide a significant
defense against mind affecting spells.
dropLocation: The Lost Seekers, End reward

name: Gravekeeper's Bowler
description: This once belonged to the owner of a sprawling cemetery.
dropLocation: Land of Lamordia, Vornir Frosthelm 's chest

name: Gravekeeper's Cap
description: A well-made cap meant for those digging graves.
dropLocation: Land of Lamordia, Experiment Y 's chest

name: Gravekeeper's Cowl
description: For the gravekeeper that knows where all the good treasures are buried.
dropLocation: A Light in the Attic, secret area chest

name: Gravekeeper's Helm
description:
Guards were once hired to protect a nearby cemetery. This helmet is a reminder
of their failure.
dropLocation: Land of Lamordia, Fangs of Winter 's chest

name: Gravekeeper's Top Hat
description:
Financing a cemetery seemed like a sure bet, but the financier that owned this
hat wasn't especially good with numbers.
dropLocation: Zoo Creeper, end chest

name: Green Steel Helm
description: A helmet crafted from green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Guardian's Helmet (Level 19)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Breaking the Ranks, End reward

name: Guardian's Helmet (Level 27)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Breaking the Ranks, End reward

name: Halcyonia
description:
Shavarath may never know peace, but when this helm rests upon one's head, it
almost seems... possible.
dropLocation: The Archons' Trial, end chest

name: Hardened Hide Helm
description: Hide worked over and strengthened to be almost as durable as metal.
dropLocation: Assault on the Aerie of the Slave Lords, End chest

name: Hat of the Head Chef
description:
Legends say this hat was worn by the first winner of the Feast, who may or may
not have been a Vargouille.
dropLocation: Too Many Cooks, end chest

name: Hat of the Night Hag
description: Many candy-loving hags died to bring us this hat.
dropLocation:
The Night Revels, Turn in Joe Candymaker :
100 Piece of Darkest Chocolate; obtained in the Graveyard mob slayer, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace 10 Spooky Almond, obtained in Under New Ravagement, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace 20 Black Apple; obtained in Haverdashed, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace 20 Pinch of Sinister Cinnamon; obtained in The Snitch and the Lich, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace

name: Headman's Hood
description:
A dirty cloth hood spattered with blood. It stinks of old sweat and gives off
an aura of palpable fear.
dropLocation: The Mystery of Delera's Tomb, End Chest

name: Helm of Clarity
description: Open your inner eye.
dropLocation: The Borderlands, chest (Rare Encounters)

name: Helm of Eternal Day
description: A dream of everlasting day was forged into this fine elven helm.
dropLocation: The Key to the Mythal, end chest

name: Helm of Eternal Night
description:
Sacred moonlight shone on the creation of this helm, giving its guidance to
those who wear it.
dropLocation: Seeds of Decay, end chest

name: Helm of Freewill
description:
This ancient helmet is still in pristine condition after thousands of years.
It was crafted by Drow slaves to attempt to resist the mind control of their
quori masters.
dropLocation: The Twilight Forge, underwater chest

name: Helm of Frost
description:
This helm has a chill about it and is cold where it touches your skin. Nevertheless
it will protect you from harmful cold magic, and allows you to release some
of that energy against foes.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope, end chest, and The Chronoscope (Legendary), heroic chest

name: Helm of the Artblade
description:
When the Echo broke off from the Artblade, the force of its defiance manifested
this helm, and shares its clarity of purpose.
dropLocation: Ruins of Myth Drannor, Yegora 's chest (rare)

name: Home Renovation Hat
description:
This cap doesn't look like a hard hat, but it confers a surprising amount of
protection from workplace hazards. Safety first!

description: This black cowl drives even the laziest to action.

description: A hood to keep those moving about the streets at night warm.
dropLocation: The Wish, end chest

name: Lamordian Helm
description:
Once worn by private guards of aristocracy, these helms are often left by the
side of the road. This one appears to have been modified.
dropLocation: Special Delivery, end chest

name: Lamordian Top Hat
description: Noble. Distinguished. Taller than most other hats.
dropLocation: The Proper Authorities, end chest

name: Legendary Alchemist's Crown
description:
House Cannith alchemists often don crowns such as this to grant them wisdom
and foresight, allowing them to make decisions with greater clarity.
dropLocation: Legendary Lord of Blades, Raid Warded chest

name: Legendary Arcsteel Brim
description: Keeps the rain out of your eyes.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Legendary Big Top
description:
This is the strange, formal hat that Malicia was wearing when she was defeated.
Placing it atop one's head confers a greater understanding of all things magical.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Big Top

name: Legendary Boundless
description: The possibilities are limitless.
dropLocation: To Curse the Sky, End Chest

name: Legendary Chainmail Coif
description: Fine links of flametouched iron form this magical helm.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Chainmail Coif

name: Legendary Chimera's Crown
description: A sturdy helm that is often a gift to the dragonmarked from House Deneith.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Chimera's Crown

name: Legendary Circlet of Shar
description: Shar's faithful have been known to wear this style of circlet.
dropLocation: The Darkness and the Light, end chest

name: Legendary Compliance
description: Of course. Whatever you say.
dropLocation: The Age of Rage, End chest

name: Legendary Cowl of the Devotee
description: A covering made for those devoted to one of the Temple's twisted cults, reclaimed.
dropLocation: ToEE: Lower Temple Complex, end chest

name: Legendary Crown of Butterflies
description: Delightful butterflies flutter around your head.
dropLocation: Immortality Lessons, End chest, 'Granny' Optional Chest

name: Legendary Crown of Evening's Rise
description: The cool of twilight surrounds this helmet's metallic frame.
dropLocation: Secrets of the Red Wizards, end chest

name: Legendary Crown of Fireflies
description: The warm and inviting light of living fireflies fill you with hope.
dropLocation: The Endless Revels, End chest

name: Legendary Crown of Leaves
description: This Eladrin crown is exquisitely crafted.
dropLocation: Make Believe, End chest

name: Legendary Crown of Morning's Glory
description:
As the morning brings comfort to those who lived through the night, this helm
brings fire and light.
dropLocation: Oghma's Song, end chest

name: Legendary Crown of Snow
description: A crown of packed snow and arcane magic, both beautiful and cold.
dropLocation: The Legend of the Lost Locket, End chest

name: Legendary Darkstorm Helm
description:
Helms such as this, forged from some dark and glittering metal, are worn by
drow spellcasters both arcane and divine to heighten the power of their spells.
This helm can channel enough energy to start a brief thunderstorm.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Darkstorm Helm

name: Legendary Defender's Masque
dropLocation: The Curse and the Captive Crustacean, end chest

name: Legendary Downcast Bowler
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Ends and Means, end chest

name: Legendary Downcast Cap
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: A Miner Sacrifice, optional chest

name: Legendary Downcast Cowl
description: This discarded cowl has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Snowfall and Sunlight, Potion Paw 's chest

name: Legendary Downcast Helm
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Cold Snap, end chest

name: Legendary Downcast Top Hat
description: This discarded hat has had extra experimental slots worked into its fabric.
dropLocation: Locked Away (Part Two), end chest

name: Legendary Dread Stalker's Skullcap
description: The lenses fused into this mask tint the world a dusty red.
dropLocation: Spiders and Flies, End Chest

name: Legendary Drow Sage's Cowl
description:
The wise are just as vulnerable as anyone else to having their thoughts twisted;
they just believe more fervently that they were right all along.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

name: Legendary Elder's Cap
description:
Tribal drow elders use these caps to focus their minds and recall past events.
They are passed down through the generations but few of them remain in existence.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Elder's Cap

name: Legendary Executioner's Helm
description: The look of these eyes is the last thing many will ever see.
dropLocation: Secret of the Slavers' Stockade, End chest

augmentSlots.type: Against the Slave Lords Set Bonus

name: Legendary Fancy Flayer's Headpiece
description: You can't just devour intelligence, you have to look smart as well!
dropLocation: Fred's First Date, end chest
setBonus: Legendary Date With a Mind Flayer

name: Legendary Firemouth's Diving Helmet
description: This sturdy metal helmet allows you to breathe underwater.
dropLocation: Isle of Dread (wilderness), rare encounter chest

name: Legendary Flame Priest's Focus
description:
A long-dead leader of the Eternal Flame left their mark behind, in the hopes
someone would take up their mantle.
dropLocation: ToEE: Depths of the Temple, end chest

name: Legendary Gravekeeper's Bowler
description: This once belonged to the owner of a sprawling cemetery.
dropLocation: Land of Lamordia, Vornir Frosthelm 's chest

name: Legendary Gravekeeper's Cap
description: A well-made cap meant for those digging graves.
dropLocation: Land of Lamordia, Experiment Y 's chest

name: Legendary Gravekeeper's Cowl
description: For the gravekeeper that knows where all the good treasures are buried.
dropLocation: A Light in the Attic, secret area chest

name: Legendary Gravekeeper's Helm
description:
Guards were once hired to protect a nearby cemetery. This helmet is a reminder
of their failure.
dropLocation: Land of Lamordia, Fangs of Winter 's chest

name: Legendary Gravekeeper's Top Hat
description:
Financing a cemetery seemed like a sure bet, but the financier that owned this
hat wasn't especially good with numbers.
dropLocation: Zoo Creeper, end chest

name: Legendary Green Steel Helm
description: A helmet crafted from green steel.
dropLocation: Altar of Fecundity, Manufactured Ingredient Recipes

name: Legendary Hardened Hide
description: Hide worked over and strengthened to be almost as durable as metal.
dropLocation: Assault on the Aerie of the Slave Lords, End chest

name: Legendary Hat of the Head Chef
description:
Legends say this hat was worn by the first winner of the Feast, who may or may
not have been a Vargouille.
dropLocation: Too Many Cooks, end chest
_file: Legendary Hat of the Head Chef.item

name: Legendary Helm of Eternal Day
description: A dream of everlasting day was forged into this fine elven helm.
dropLocation: The Key to the Mythal, end chest

name: Legendary Helm of Eternal Night
description:
Sacred moonlight shone on the creation of this helm, giving its guidance to
those who wear it.
dropLocation: Seeds of Decay, end chest

name: Legendary Helm of Frost
description:
This helm has a chill about it and is cold where it touches your skin. Nevertheless
it will protect you from harmful cold magic, and allows you to release some
of that energy against foes.
dropLocation: The Chronoscope (Legendary), end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Helm of Frost

name: Legendary Helm of the Artblade
description:
When the Echo broke off from the Artblade, the force of its defiance manifested
this helm, and shares its clarity of purpose.
dropLocation: Ruins of Myth Drannor, Yegora 's chest (rare)

name: Legendary Helm of the Crownblade
description:
When the Echo broke off from the Crownblade, the force of its defiance manifested
this helm, and shares its clarity of purpose.
dropLocation: Ruins of Myth Drannor, Yegora 's chest (rare)

name: Legendary Helm of the Mroranon
description:
This powerful helm is an ancient keepsake of the Mroranon Clan of the Ironroot
Mountains.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Helm of the Mroranon

name: Legendary Helm of the Red Dragon
description: This helm is crafted in the likeness of a vicious red dragon.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Helm of the Red Dragon
setBonus: Legendary Soul of the Red Dragon
_file: Legendary Helm of the Red Dragon.item

name: Legendary Helm of the Sun's Wrath
description: Summer's sun is blessing and a curse all in one.
dropLocation: Death Hosts This Banquet, end chest
_file: Legendary Helm of the Sun's Wrath.item

name: Legendary Helm of the Warblade
description:
When the Echo broke off from the Warblade, the force of its defiance manifested
this helm, and shares its clarity of purpose.
dropLocation: Ruins of Myth Drannor, Yegora 's chest (rare)

name: Legendary Helm of Workplace Safety
dropLocation: The Covered Culvert, end chest

name: Legendary Home Renovation Hat
description:
This cap doesn't look like a hard hat, but it confers a surprising amount of
protection from workplace hazards. Safety first!
dropLocation: This Old Haunt, end chest, Wraith chest

name: Legendary Lamordian Bowler
description: A rounded bowler for a dapper gentleperson.
dropLocation: Beneath the City Streets, end chest

name: Legendary Lamordian Cap
description: A smart and sturdy cap.
dropLocation: The Body Snatchers, end chest

name: Legendary Lamordian Cowl
description: A hood to keep those moving about the streets at night warm.
dropLocation: The Wish, end chest

name: Legendary Lamordian Helm
description:
Once worn by private guards of aristocracy, these helms are often left by the
side of the road. This one appears to have been modified.
dropLocation: Special Delivery, end chest

name: Legendary Lamordian Top Hat
description: Noble. Distinguished. Taller than most other hats.
dropLocation: The Proper Authorities, end chest

name: Legendary Mask of Comedy
description:
A mask crafted for and used by the actors of Livewood Theater. It represents
happiness and high spirits, and is invested with magic to match.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Mask of Comedy

name: Legendary Mask of the Vulkoorim
description: The mask, a relic held by the Vulkoorim, whispers to those who dare wear it.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

name: Legendary Mask of Tragedy
description:
A mask crafted for and used by the actors of Livewood Theater. It represents
sadness and misfortune, and is invested with magic to match.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Mask of Tragedy

name: Legendary Mighty Stormreach Guardian's Helm
description:
The Guards of Stormreach Harbor are known to wear these helmets at times. Remaining
vigilant night after night could drive the weaker-willed to madness.
dropLocation: Night Falls on Stormreach, End Chest

name: Legendary Pansophic Circlet
description: While wearing this circlet, you feel a surge of immense power.
dropLocation: Memoirs of an Illusory Larcener, End chest

name: Legendary Sacrarium Suncatcher
description: Keeps the sun out of your eyes.
dropLocation: Bullywugs and Booby Traps, end chest

name: Legendary Sacred Helm
description:
Though used primarily by drow ascetics, this helm will protect any healer from
death magic and the undead.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Sacred Helm

name: Legendary Shining Crest of St. Markus
description:
A circlet of pure silver, wearable only by the virtuous souls that would risk
their own lives to combat the forces of darkness.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Shining Crest of St. Markus
_file: Legendary Shining Crest of St. Markus.item

name: Legendary Skullduggery Cap
description: When shady work is the order of the evening, a light cap can be essential.
dropLocation: The Final Enemy, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Skullduggery Cap

name: Legendary Smuggler's Cap
description:
The sort of cap used by smugglers and lawful sailors alike, allowing the user
to fit into mixed company.
dropLocation: The Haunting of Saltmarsh, end chest, or Legendary version of Epic Smuggler's Cap

name: Legendary Sojourner's Cowl
description:
Many travellers have attempted to navigate through the Underdark, but far fewer
have lived to the end of their dangerous journeys. This abandoned cowl serves
as a stark reminder of what becomes of those who leave their dwellings without
a map and a properly-stocked knapsack.
dropLocation: Third Time's a Charm, End chest

name: Legendary Spiked Turban
description: A spiked metal helm with a silk wrapping to ward off the desert sun.
dropLocation: Legendary version of Epic Spiked Turban

name: Legendary Standard Issue Faceplate
description: Slightly dented, barely used, better than anything else around.
dropLocation: Just Business, End chest

name: Legendary Teraza's Perfect Sight
description:
A crown said to have been originally crafted for the hag queen Sora Teraza.
It bestows its wearer with great wisdom, reflexes, and magical power.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, upgraded version of Legendary Teraza's Sight

name: Legendary Teraza's Sight
description:
A crown said to have been originally crafted for the hag queen Sora Teraza.
It bestows its wearer with great wisdom, reflexes, and magical power.
dropLocation: Frame Work, End chests, Dorris ' chests

name: Legendary Tiara of Madness
description: The intelligent truly have more mind to bring to the madness.
dropLocation: The Age of Rage, End chest

name: Legendary Umber Brim
description: Keeps the shadows out of your eyes.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Legendary Unbreakable Stormreach Guardian's Helm
description:
The Guards of Stormreach Harbor are known to wear these helmets at times. Putting
one's safety on the line day after day could drive the weaker-willed to madness.
dropLocation: Quarantine, End Chest

name: Legendary University Champion's Helm
description:
This helm was clearly used by some past adventurer, but that hasn't diminished
its potential.
dropLocation: Party 101, End chest

name: Legendary University Investigator's Hat
description:
The markings on this hat make it seem as if it were once used by an Inquisitive,
but its destiny remains a mystery.
dropLocation: What Dreams May Come, End chest

name: Legendary University Mage's Hat
description:
Though it may have lost some of its original luster, this form of hat never
goes out of style in Sharn.
dropLocation: The Devils to Pay, End chest

name: Legendary University Sentry's Helm
description:
Used by guardians of the gates, this helmet has lost its purpose but seems like
it could find a new one.
dropLocation: Paper Trail, End chest

name: Legendary Walking Ancestor's Helmet
description: The belt buckle accent on this hat is a good indication of its age.
dropLocation: Plundering Pirates' Point, end chest

name: Legendary Wallwatch Circlet
description: Keep your eyes on the horizon.
dropLocation: Ruinous Schemes, End chest

name: Lucky Hat
description:
This jaunty hat, originally worn by Three Toed Tobias is said to imbue its wearer
with incredible luck.
dropLocation: Special event items, New Theater Event for correct answer.

A mask crafted for and used by the actors of the Livewood Theater . It represents
happiness and high spirits, and is invested with magic to match.
dropLocation: Under the Big Top, Maz'il'tilnik 's or Herli'nak the Untamed 's chest

description: This mask is worn by the attendants of the bleakest ward in the asylum.
dropLocation: The Old Archives, End chest (by the third Fragment)

name: Mask of the Scourge
description: Shaped by the Celestial you share a Bond with, this mask represents your calling.
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Mask of the Vulkoorim
description: The mask, a relic held by the Vulkoorim, whispers to those who dare wear it.
dropLocation: Toxic Treatment, End chest

description:
A mask crafted for and used by the actors of the Livewood Theater . It represents
sadness and misfortune, and is invested with magic to match.
dropLocation: Partycrashers, Theater, Rest Room or End chests

name: Memories of Charity
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone who gave everything they had when
it mattered most.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Memories of Immortality
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone courageous.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Memories of Insight
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone who knew everything.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Memories of Kindness
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone who was kind to you.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Memories of the Mighty
description:
A fragment of a misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone mighty.
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, End chest

name: Memories of the Unseen
description:
A fragment of misplaced thought, a brilliant light you once remembered. This
tattered memory was once the face of someone you never knew
dropLocation: Memory Lapse, end chest

vigilant night after night could drive the weaker-willed to madness.

Deathhoof. The gemstone is said to contain several drops of his blood.

name: Morion of the Undying
description: This golden helmet brings hope and peace to those you protect.
dropLocation: Peril of the Planar Eyes, any end chest

name: Muffled Veneer
description:
This hood and face guard are rumored to have belonged to Captain Slipclaw, an
infamous pillager of early Stormreach.
dropLocation: Tattered Tapestries, Turn in 20 Tattered Tapestries

name: Mushroom Cap
description:
This large mushroom cap, a remnant of Zuggtmoy's power, has an indent large
enough to fit one's head. To the resourceful adventurer, anything can become
useful gear.
dropLocation: ToEE: Water Node, Jotun Rimeblade chest (Confirmed), ToEE: Earth Node, Hyrelgas chest (Confirmed), ToEE: Air Node, dragon's hoard chests, and ToEE: Fire Node, Periron chest

name: Mystic Band
description:
Ghola-Fan contracted a treasure seeker to bring him treasures from all over
Eberron. The origin of this piece is unknown because Ghola-Fan killed the treasure
seeker before he learned it. He quickly discovered that the band would not
fit and tossed it into his vault.
dropLocation: Bring Me the Head of Ghola-Fan!, treasure room end chest

name: Mythic Emerald Gaze
description:
It is said, the only way to obtain a helm of the Emerald Claw is to join their
ranks... or to remove their head.
dropLocation: Desecrated Temple of Vol (epic), End chest

name: Mythic Minos Legens
dropLocation: Flesh Maker's Laboratory (epic), end chest

name: Mythic Muffled Veneer
description:
This hood and face guard are rumored to have belonged to Captain Slipclaw, an
infamous pillager of early Stormreach.
dropLocation: Ghosts of Perdition (epic), end chest

name: Mythic Seraphim
description: This helm was taken from the body of a fallen Astral Deva.
dropLocation: Inferno of the Damned (epic), end chest

name: Nightforge Darkhelm
description:
The final piece of the armor worn by the most celebrated of the Duergar, the
Darkhelm protects its wearer from mental attack.
dropLocation: A Relic of a Sovereign Past, Turn in 10 Adamantine Ore

name: Pansophic Circlet
description: While wearing this circlet, you feel a surge of immense power.
dropLocation: Memoirs of an Illusory Larcener, End chest

description:
Helms such as this, forged from some dark and glittering metal, are worn by
drow spellcasters both arcane and divine to heighten the power of their spells.
This helm can channel enough energy to start a brief thunderstorm.

name: Pirate's Bandana
description:
Found in an old pirate's cache, this bandana is favored by those who enjoy skulking
in the shadows.
dropLocation: Special event items, Talk Like a Pirate Day

name: Plume of Adherence
description:
This helm is mainly an emerald color, with a bright blood red plume running
down the center. An etched claw adorns the right side.
dropLocation: Emerald Claw Nugget, End reward

name: Plundered Pirate Hat
description:
Stolen fair and square from a long string of disreputable pirates, tracing all
the way back to a surly Bugbear deckhand in Lhazaar.
dropLocation: Prove Your Worth (epic), end chest

name: Pointed Crown
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Purple Dragon Helm
description:
This helmet is of the same make as those worn by the famed Purple Dragon Knights
of Cormyr.
dropLocation: Eveningstar, Turn in 5 Commendations: Purple Dragon Knights Commendation: Purple Dragon Knights : This is a valuable item that can be exchanged for goods if brought to a Challenge Trader. This is a token of favor earned by helping the Purple Dragon Knights. You can exchange it in Eveningstar for powerful equipment.

name: Puzzle Cap
description:
When placed in the correct configuration, these loose pieces of misshapen cloth
magically formed an elaborate headpiece.
dropLocation: The Seal of Shan-To-Kor, End reward

name: Renard's Elegant Hat
description:
This jaunty hat was once owned by Renard Lyrandar, a famous airship captian.
This once influential member of house Lyrandar was lost when his ship disappeared
several decades ago, never to be heard from again.
dropLocation: Wrath of the Flame, End chest

name: Rider's Chapeau
description: Keeps the sunset out of your eyes.
dropLocation: Treasure Hunt, End Chest

name: Royal Guard Mask
description:
These masks were given to Ghola-Fan's most trusted guards. With a simple command
word, they would be able to join him at a moment's notice in the event of trouble.
dropLocation: Bring Me the Head of Ghola-Fan!, treasure room end chest

name: Rusted Crown
description: At least this helm has nothing to fear from rust monsters.

death magic and the undead.

Be thou the bringer of justice, but trust not thine eyes; the truth is better

dropLocation:
The Night Revels, Turn in Joe Candymaker,
100 Piece of Darkest Chocolate; obtained in the Graveyard mob slayer, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace 20 Spooky Almond, obtained in Under New Ravagement, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace 10 Black Apple; obtained in Haverdashed, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace 20 Shadowy Caramel; obtained in The Kobolds' Newest Ringleader, Hayweird Foundry, or Getting Ahead in Lordsmarch Palace

name: Silver Dragonscale Helmet
description: Shines with brilliant silver scales.
dropLocation: Too Hot to Handle, End chest

name: Skirmisher's Circlet (Level 19)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Breaking the Ranks, End reward

name: Skirmisher's Circlet (Level 27)
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Breaking the Ranks, End reward

name: Skull Fetish Mask
description:
This horrid mask is fashioned from the skull fragments of various races. Red
silk cords hold this gruesome artifacts together. The mask seems to compel
obedience in all who view it.
dropLocation: The Titan Awakes, Raid Warded chest

name: Skullduggery Cap
description: When shady work is the order of the evening, a light cap can be essential.
dropLocation: The Final Enemy, end chest

name: Smuggler's Cap
description:
The sort of cap used by smugglers and lawful sailors alike, allowing the user
to fit into mixed company.
dropLocation: The Haunting of Saltmarsh, end chest

name: Sojourner's Cowl
dropLocation: Third Time's a Charm, End chest

name: Spiked Turban
description: A spiked metal helm with a silk wrapping to ward off the desert sun.
dropLocation:
Sands of Menechtarun, Mendexethazz 's Chest (Rare Encounter) ; 
 Masei Mkembe sells for 625 Antique Bronze Tokens

name: Spooky Festival Mask
description:
Wear this to spook your friends! This mask has a human-like skull face and gives
you a +5 bonus to both the Intimidate skill and the Haggle skill when worn.
dropLocation: DDO Store, Trivia Contest reward for Correct Answer

name: Standard Issue Faceplate
description: Slightly dented, barely used, better than anything else around.
dropLocation: Just Business, End chest

name: Straw Hat
description: This straw hat glows faintly of magical energy.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, End reward

name: Swabby's Kerchief
description: This plain bandana makes you want to go ARRRGH.
dropLocation: Treasure of Crystal Cove, Turn in at Euphonia's Hat Box

name: Sworn Silver Helm
description:
Exquisite and enchanted, this holy helm will help those with Paladin levels
channel their energies into their foes.
dropLocation: Obstructing the Orcs, end chest

name: Tainted Helm of Mystery
description:
Favored by those of a darker nature, this helm offers a mysterious bonus to
those who wear it.
dropLocation: Special event items, Emerald Claw Conspiracy

name: Tattered Cowl
description: This cloth cowl glows slightly with magical energy.
dropLocation: Stopping the Sahuagin, End reward

name: Teraza's Perfect Sight
description:
This crown, said to have been originally crafted for the hag queen Sora Teraza,
has been upgraded. It bestows its wearer with great wisdom, and the ability
to see things as they truly are.
dropLocation: Cauldron of Sora Katra, Upgrade of Teraza's Sight, a Mark of Tzaryan Rrac, and a Mark of Sheshka .

name: Teraza's Sight
description:
A crown said to have been originally crafted for the hag queen Sora Teraza.
It bestows its wearer with great wisdom, and the ability to see things as they
truly are.
dropLocation: Frame Work, End chests, Dorris ' chests

name: The Admiral of Bling
description:
Flashy, ostentatious, AND completely over the top. This pirate hat is too powerful
to accept dyes, so don't even try.
dropLocation: Special event items, Caypenne Drop-axe

name: The Anguished Mind
dropLocation: Relentless, end chest

name: The Big Top
description:
This is the strange, formal hat that Malicia was wearing when she was defeated.
Placing it atop one's head confers a greater understanding of all things magical.
dropLocation: Under the Big Top, end chest

name: The Brass Admiral
description: This fine leather-and-brass hat is as sturdy as it is commanding.
dropLocation: Saltmarsh, any legendary chest; or The Haunting of Saltmarsh (Epic) saga end reward

description: Time-Twisted version of The Admiral of Bling and The Captain of Bling
dropLocation: Timeline Fragment Exchange, Turn in 50 Timeline Fragments

name: The Mask of the Killer
dropLocation: Relentless, end chest

name: Tiara of Madness
description: The intelligent truly have more mind to bring to the madness.
dropLocation: The Age of Rage, end chest

name: Titania's Glory
description:
FEYTWISTED form of Legendary Crown of Butterflies 

Delightful butterflies flutter around your head. It seems Titania herself
is protecting you from harm.
dropLocation: The Feywild, Feytwisted chests

name: Totemic Lavalier
description:
Riedran royalty float these pendants over their foreheads to protect their minds
from psionic assassins.
dropLocation: Tattered Tapestries, Turn in 20 Tattered Tapestries

name: Tradusor
description: Phiarlan's greatest assassins are honored with a gift of these helms.
dropLocation: Tattered Tapestries, Turn in 20 Tattered Tapestries

name: Trailblazer's Resilient Hood
description: This item cannot be fed to sentient jewels .
dropLocation: Advance to level 15, End reward

name: Umber Brim
description: Keeps the shadows out of your eyes.
dropLocation: No Refunds, End chest

name: Unbreakable Stormreach Guardian's Helm
description:
The Guards of Stormreach Harbor are known to wear these helmets at times. Putting
one's safety on the line day after day could drive the weaker-willed to madness.
dropLocation: Quarantine, End Chest

name: Undying Gaze
description:
Noble bugbears who are mummified are often buried wearing one of these masks
as a headdress. The eyes are made to appear to be always open, intended to
scare off any would be tomb raider.
dropLocation: Tattered Tapestries, Turn in 20 Tattered Tapestries

name: University Champion's Helm
description:
This helm was clearly used by some past adventurer, but that hasn't diminished
its potential.
dropLocation: Party 101, End chest

name: University Investigator's Hat
description:
The markings on this hat make it seem as if it were once used by an Inquisitive,
but its destiny remains a mystery.
dropLocation: What Dreams May Come, End chest

name: University Mage's Hat
description:
Though it may have lost some of its original luster, this form of hat never
goes out of style in Sharn.
dropLocation: The Devils to Pay, End chest

name: University Sentry's Helm
description:
Used by guardians of the gates, this helmet has lost its purpose but seems like
it could find a new one.
dropLocation: Paper Trail, End chest

name: Walking Ancestor's Helmet
description: The belt buckle accent on this hat is a good indication of its age.
dropLocation: Plundering Pirates' Point, end chest

name: Wallwatch Circlet
description: Keep your eyes on the horizon.
dropLocation: Ruinous Schemes, End chest

name: White Hood of Schemes
description: Lined with gilded thread and smells faintly of incense.
dropLocation: Watch Your Step, end chest

name: Wind Howler Mask
description: Howl like the storm itself.
dropLocation: Killing Time, End chest

name: Yarkuch's Helm
description: This helm once belonged to Yarkuch, mighty warrior chief of Splinterskull.
dropLocation: Assault on Splinterskull, End reward
